description: Create a histogram visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop to analyze the distribution of order profits using the sample order data located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\'. Configure the histogram with the 'Profit' column on the X-Axis and 'Count' or 'Frequency' on the Y-Axis, adjusted to approximately 20 bins. Set the visualization title to 'Distribution of Order Profits' and save the workbook as 'ProfitDistribution'.
